model.Game

  • Verwendungen von Game in controller

    Methoden in controller, die Game zurückgeben
    Modifizierer und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    static Game
    GameController.createNewGame()
    Creates and initializes a new Game.
    static Game
    GameController.loadGame()
    Loads a previously saved Game.
    Methoden in controller mit Parametern vom Typ Game
    Modifizierer und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    static Player
    PlayerController.createNewPlayer(String name, String gender, Game game)
    Creates a new player with default attributes and starter items.
    static Dungeon
    GameController.getDungeon(Game game)
    Returns the game's dungeon.
    static Enemy[]
    GameController.getEnemies(Game game)
    Returns all enemies available in the game.
    static Player
    GameController.getPlayer(Game game)
    Returns the current player.
    static void
    GameController.setPlayer(Game game, Player player)
    Sets the current player for the game.

    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung
     
    CreateNewSavePanel(GameFrame frame, Game game)
    Creates a new character creation panel.

    Konstruktoren in view.battle mit Parametern vom Typ Game
    Modifizierer
    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung
     
    BattleMenuPanel(Game game)
    Constructs the battle menu panel and initializes UI components.
     
    BattleView(Game game)
    Creates a new battle view.

  • Verwendungen von Game in view.gamewindow

    Konstruktoren in view.gamewindow mit Parametern vom Typ Game
    Modifizierer
    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung
     
    DungeonPanel(Game game)
    Creates a new dungeon panel and initializes the first rendered view.
     
    GameWindow(GameFrame frame, Game game)
    Creates the main gameplay window.

  • Verwendungen von Game in view.pausemenu

    Methoden in view.pausemenu mit Parametern vom Typ Game
    Modifizierer und Typ
    Methode
    Beschreibung
    static Map.Entry<Item,Boolean>
    EquipmentSelectionDialog.showDialog(StatusScreen parent, Game game, Itemtype type)
    Displays the equipment selection dialog and waits for user input.
    Konstruktoren in view.pausemenu mit Parametern vom Typ Game
    Modifizierer
    Konstruktor
    Beschreibung
     
    EquipmentPanel(GameFrame frame, StatsPanel statsPanel, Game game)
    Creates an EquipmentPanel and initializes all equipment slots UI.
     
    InventoryScreen(Game game)
    Creates the inventory screen UI and binds it to the given game instance.
     
    OptionScreen(GameFrame frame, Game game)
    Creates an options screen for an active game session.
     
    StatsPanel(Game game)
    Creates a new statistics panel for the given game instance.
     
    StatusScreen(GameFrame frame, Game game)
    Creates a new status screen displaying the player's stats, character image, and equipment information.
